slides.headline: A glazier we work with kept missing the calls that paid best.
slides.body: The emergencies always come out of hours. Swipe.

slides.headline: Smashed shopfront at 2am. Patio door on a bank holiday.
slides.body: If he didn't pick up, they rang the next glazier in Google. Board-up gone.

slides.headline: We gave him an after-hours receptionist.
slides.body: It answers, takes the details, and books the emergency in — 24/7.

slides.headline: He sleeps through the phone now — and still wakes up to the job booked.
And the daytime quote requests?
slides.body: Answered instantly, not end-of-day when he's finally off site.

slides.headline: Missing the after-hours emergencies?
slides.save: Save this for the next 2am call
